name: US Dollar
flag_desc: red and white horizontal stripes with blue canton containing small white stars, simplified to bold red-white-blue blocks

name: Euro
flag_desc: solid blue circle background with ring of yellow stars around edge, simplified to blue circle with yellow star dots on perimeter

name: British Pound
flag_desc: Union Jack: blue field with red cross of St George edged white, white saltire of St Andrew, red saltire of St Patrick, simplified to geometric cross pattern in navy blue white red

name: Japanese Yen
flag_desc: solid red circle centered on plain white background, Hinomaru flag

name: Swiss Franc
flag_desc: solid red square background with white equilateral cross centered, Swiss cross

name: Canadian Dollar
flag_desc: red and white vertical bands with red maple leaf in center white band, simplified to red-white-red vertical with orange leaf shape

name: Australian Dollar
flag_desc: blue field with Union Jack canton, large white seven-pointed star below, smaller stars on right, simplified to blue with white star cluster

name: New Zealand Dollar
flag_desc: blue field with Union Jack canton, four red stars with white outlines on right side representing Southern Cross, simplified to blue with four red stars

name: Swedish Krona
flag_desc: blue field with yellow Nordic cross extending to edges, yellow cross on blue

name: Norwegian Krone
flag_desc: red field with blue Nordic cross outlined in white, blue cross with white border on red

name: Danish Krone
flag_desc: red field with white Nordic cross extending to edges, simple white cross on red

name: Polish Zloty
flag_desc: horizontal bicolor white top half red bottom half, simple white over red stripe

name: Czech Koruna
flag_desc: triangle of white over red with blue triangle at hoist side, simplified to blue wedge on left with white-red horizontal right half

name: Hungarian Forint
flag_desc: horizontal tricolor red white green from top, simple three equal stripes

name: Romanian Leu
flag_desc: vertical tricolor blue yellow red from hoist, simple three equal vertical stripes

name: Bulgarian Lev
flag_desc: horizontal tricolor white green red from top, simple three equal stripes

name: Turkish Lira
flag_desc: red field with white crescent moon and five-pointed star offset to the right, red background with white crescent-star

name: Israeli Shekel
flag_desc: two horizontal blue stripes at top and bottom with white center stripe, blue Star of David in center of white band

name: Chilean Peso
flag_desc: horizontal bicolor white top red bottom with blue canton and white star in upper left corner, simplified to white-red with blue square and white star

name: Philippine Peso
flag_desc: horizontal bicolor blue top red bottom with white triangle at hoist containing yellow sun, simplified to blue-red with white triangle and yellow sun emblem

name: Indonesian Rupiah
flag_desc: simple horizontal bicolor red over white, two equal bands red top white bottom

name: Malaysian Ringgit
flag_desc: red and white stripes with blue canton containing yellow crescent and star, simplified to red-white stripes with blue-yellow corner

name: Thai Baht
flag_desc: five horizontal stripes red white blue white red from top with blue double-width center stripe, simplified to red-white-blue-white-red bands

name: Singapore Dollar
flag_desc: red top half white bottom half with red crescent moon and five stars on white side, simplified to red-over-white with crescent and five dots

name: Hong Kong Dollar
flag_desc: red field with white stylized five-petal bauhinia flower in center, simplified to red background with white flower shape

name: South Korean Won
flag_desc: white field with red and blue taegeuk yin-yang circle in center and four black trigrams at corners, simplified to white with red-blue center circle

name: Mexican Peso
flag_desc: vertical tricolor green white red from hoist with national coat of arms in center white band, simplified to green-white-red vertical stripes

name: South African Rand
flag_desc: complex horizontal Y-shaped green band splitting into red and blue with narrow color stripes, simplified to green red blue with gold accents

name: Brazilian Real
flag_desc: green field with yellow diamond containing blue globe with curved band, simplified to green with yellow diamond and blue circle center

name: Indian Rupee
flag_desc: horizontal tricolor saffron white green from top with navy blue Ashoka Chakra wheel in center white band, simplified to orange-white-green with blue wheel

name: Taiwan Dollar
flag_desc: red field with blue canton in upper left containing white sun with twelve triangular rays, simplified to red with blue corner and white sunburst

name: Chinese Yuan
flag_desc: red field with one large yellow star and four smaller yellow stars arranged in arc in upper left canton, simplified to red with five yellow stars in corner

name: Colombian Peso
flag_desc: horizontal tricolor yellow blue red from top, simple three equal stripes

name: Argentine Peso
flag_desc: horizontal triband light blue white light blue with golden Sun of May face in center white band, simplified to light-blue-white-light-blue with golden sun circle
